title: Global Government Contracts & Tenders Scraper Input
description: Search official public procurement sources and export normalized contract/tender records.

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Official procurement sources to search. SAM.gov requires a user-provided API key.

keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: Optional search terms. Leave empty to return recent tenders from selected sources.

dateFrom.title: Published from
dateFrom.description: Publication start date in YYYY-MM-DD. Defaults to 30 days ago.

dateTo.title: Published to
dateTo.description: Publication end date in YYYY-MM-DD. Defaults to today.

country.title: Country filter
country.description: Optional country/region filter. For SAM.gov use a US state code like CA or NY. For UK/TED, this is applied as a text filter.

noticeStatus.title: Notice status
noticeStatus.description: Which opportunity status to target where supported.

maxResults.title: Max results
maxResults.description: Maximum total records saved across all selected sources and keywords.

samApiKey.title: SAM.gov API key
samApiKey.description: Optional SAM.gov public API key. Required only when SAM.gov is selected.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Not usually needed for official APIs, but available for enterprise network routing.
